title: Piglin Trading Menu
description: Transform Piglin bartering into a traditional villager trading interface. Exchange gold massively, quickly, and comfortably with 100% vanilla-accurate loot.
body:
# Piglin Trading Menu

Tired of throwing gold on the ground and waiting for Piglins to inspect it? Piglin Trading Menu overhauls the vanilla bartering system by introducing a clean, traditional Villager-style trading interface! 🐷✨

![Exchange gold directly through a custom GUI. It shows your available items, locked trades when a Piglin is out of stock, and supports quick shift-clicking! 💎](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d8fb1c0c2d38c88908969ebab7315f9df4738f.png)

## Core Features

* **Instant GUI Trading:** Simply right-click any adult Piglin to open the trading menu. You can shift-click massive amounts of gold instantly without waiting for the drop animation or dealing with ghost items!
* **100% Vanilla Accurate Loot:** The trades mirror the exact vanilla bartering loot table and probabilities. Each Piglin gets a unique, seeded set of 6 items they are willing to trade.
* **Smart Restock System:** Just like real Villagers, Piglins have a limited stock for each item. Once a trade is locked, you will need to wait half a Minecraft day (10 real-world minutes) for them to restock their inventory automatically.
* **Safe Trading:** Are you exploring the Nether without gold armor? No problem! Opening the trading menu will instantly pacify an angry Piglin, freezing them in place while you do business. Once you close the menu, they will resume their normal behavior. 🛡️

![Piglins will temporarily forget their anger and become completely peaceful while you are bartering with them, even if you are not wearing gold armor. 🤝](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vbYS9Vt8/images/ff4beb621742688cf2fde3836797ee39de4b853e.gif)

## Build Your Own Trading Hall

Because Piglins now retain their unique trades and restock over time, you can finally build organized Piglin Trading Halls in the Nether just like you would with Villagers. Lock in your favorite trades and farm resources efficiently! 🏰

![Since each Piglin keeps their unique seeded trades and restocks automatically over time, you can finally build organized Piglin trading halls in the Nether. 🏰](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5403d5354845c5214745832c093caadfac592da.png)

## Technical Details

* **Requirements:** This mod must be installed on both the **Client** and the **Server** to work properly and synchronize the inventory and AI changes.
